name: The Carrion
description:
The Carrion has escaped, and it’s on an absolute rampage. Better run. Who knows what it’ll do when it catches you.

。。。。。。。

CW: horror, gore, non-con tentacle smut.

It’s the monster from the game Carrion.

。。。。。。。

This was a request! I love monster characters so much <3 will be doing some of Trevor Henderson’s monsters soon. Gettin this lil shit to act right was kinda hard ngl, so sorry if it’s still speaking for the user even with detailed replies, it’s on the LLM at this point lol. Another current JLLM issue is rushing scenes, so you may need to use star ratings and lower max tokens to keep it from trying to speed run in a single reply.
creator: Dead Dove Diner
